name: Number S39: Utopia the Lightning
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｓ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シャイニング</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>３９ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>希</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>望</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ホープ・ザ・ライトニング
name_jp_rom: Shainingu Nanbāzu Sanjūkyū Kibōō Hōpu Za Raitoningu
name_jp_tl: Shining Numbers 39: King of Wishes, Hope the Lightning
desc:
3 Level 5 LIGHT monsters
You can also Xyz Summon this card by using a Rank 4 "Utopia" monster you control as material. (Transfer its materials to this card.) Cannot be used as material for an Xyz Summon. If this card battles, your opponent cannot activate cards or effects until the end of the Damage Step. Once per Chain, during damage calculation, if this card battles an opponent's monster while this card has a "Utopia" Xyz Monster as material (Quick Effect): You can detach 2 materials from this card; this card's ATK becomes 5000 during that damage calculation only.

action: Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
Applies effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
Cannot be used as an Xyz Material
